_comment: Example local/hybrid inference topology for Sophia on Apple Silicon. Copy to config/inference.local.json and edit. Dependency-free config; consumed by future router wiring. Targets a MacBook Pro M4 Max / 48GB (NOT the M3 Ultra/96GB assumed by some external write-ups).

hardware.notes: 48GB fits a 30B-A3B MoE (4-bit, ~3B active/token) with tight context, or a 7-14B dense model. 70B is out of practical range here.

orchestrator.role: planning, routing, cheap structured tool-calls (CaMeL privileged planner)
orchestrator.notes: MLX is fastest on Apple Silicon but has no native grammar enforcement; route guaranteed-JSON turns to the tool_calls tier.

tool_calls.role: guaranteed well-formed tool-calls + CaMeL quarantined extractor (no tool access)
tool_calls.notes: GBNF/JSON-schema constrained decoding guarantees parseable tool-calls MLX cannot. Pair with semantic verification in the gateway.

escalation.role: hard reasoning the local tiers flag as low-confidence

trigger.notes: Escalate only above the difficulty/uncertainty threshold. Target >80% of turns served locally.
